original_file: Deploy to Railway with Claude, Codex, Cursor, and more
email_subject: Deploy to Railway with Claude, Codex, Cursor, and more
email_body:
Railway Logo



Deploy with agents



******************************************

Deploy to Railway with your favorite agent

******************************************



We put together some resources to help your AI agents deploy to Railway.



* Agent skills ( https://github.com/railwayapp/railway-skills?utm_campaign=%5BRelease%5D+Deploy+with+Agents&utm_content=Agents&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io )

* MCP server ( https://github.com/railwayapp/railway-mcp-server?utm_campaign=%5BRelease%5D+Deploy+with+Agents&utm_content=Agents&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io )

* Agent directory ( https://railway.com/agents?utm_campaign=%5BRelease%5D+Deploy+with+Agents&utm_content=Agents&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io )



So far, Railway agent skills are supported by Claude, OpenCode, Cursor, and Codex, while MCP additionally supports Copilot, Windsurf, Cline, and Devin.



View agent directory ( https://railway.com/agents?utm_campaign=%5BRelease%5D+Deploy+with+Agents&utm_content=Agents&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io )



Regards,



The Railway Team



Unsubscribe from marketing emails ( https://railway.com/preferences?token=75d83244-3087-49e8-a95b-a488740b3b4d&utm_campaign=%5BRelease%5D+Deploy+with+Agents&utm_content=Agents&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io )
